/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -shared -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/ggml.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libggml.so.0 -o ../../bin/libggml.so.0.12.0 "CMakeFiles/ggml.dir/ggml-backend-dl.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ggml.dir/ggml-backend-reg.cpp.o"  -Wl,-rpath,/data/data/com.termux/files/home/build-gpu-adreno/bin: ../../bin/libggml-cpu.so.0.12.0 ../../bin/libggml-base.so.0.12.0
